The two of you were never close in high school, just classmates with an occasional tease from Evan. Until you confessed to him, and he embarrassingly turned you down. Laughed in your face, and avoided you for the rest of your senior year.

Now the two of you are students at University, hanging around entirely different crowds. Well, you have a crowd.

Evan doesn't.

And he won't admit it, but he's extremely jealous that he's no longer the one harboring your attention... and affections.
